author: hucy
description: Open external links in a split-pane Web Viewer. Supports reuse, new tab, new split, and browser modes. Configurable Shift / Cmd/Ctrl click behavior. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Split Web Viewer Modifier

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Obsidian: Split Web Viewer Modifier 1.0.0

### Install manually
1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `versions.json` below.
2. Put them in `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/split-web-viewer-modifier/`.
3. Enable the plugin in Obsidian.

See [obsidian/README.md](../blob/1.0.0/obsidian/README.md) for details.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Chrome: Split Link Router 0.1.0

### Install as unpacked extension
1. Download and unzip the attached `split-link-router-chrome-0.1.0.zip`.
2. Open `chrome://extensions`, enable Developer mode.
3. Click "Load unpacked" and select the unzipped folder.

Requires **Chrome 140+**. See [chrome/README.md](../blob/chrome-v0.1.0/chrome/README.md) for details.
releases.name: Chrome Extension 0.1.0
